sentence_reviews.text: Scientific machine learning and digital twins combine physical models, learned surrogates, observations, uncertainty, and simulation for prediction or control.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins integrates Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate_references metadata only; no quoted passages or line-level excerpts supplied. Candidate sources: ref_aima: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach, 4th ed. (2021); ref_digital_twin_ai: AI Simulation by Digital Twins: Systematic Survey, Reference Framework, and Mapping to a Standardized Architecture (2025); ref_dlbook: Deep Learning (2016); ref_dreamer: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models (2023); ref_fno: Fourier Neural Operator for Parametric Partial Differential Equations (2020); ref_formalml: Formal Methods for Machine Learning: A Survey (2021); ref_neuralode: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (2018); ref_pml: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction (2022); ref_scenario_generation: Foundation Models in Autonomous Driving: A Survey on Scenario Generation and Scenario Analysis (2025).
sentence_reviews.notes: Neural operators/PINNs are directly relevant to surrogate scientific modeling; common/core strength is defensible. The sentence frames the dependency generically as application integration.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins is modeled as depending on Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data and feeding downstream nodes such as Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting, Drug discovery, protein & molecular design, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems.
